title: Indian-Style Gulab Jamun Dumplings
description: A sweet and indulgent dessert made with dumplings soaked in a rich, spiced syrup.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the milk and flour. Mix well until the flour dissolves.
2. Add the ghee or vegetable oil to the mixture and knead until a smooth dough forms.
3. Cover the dough with a damp cloth and let it rest for 30 minutes.
4. Divide the dough into small balls, about the size of a small egg.
5. Roll out each ball into a thin circle.
6. Place a tablespoon of the dough in the center of each wrapper.
7. Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
8. Heat a large saucepan with the gulab syrup and add the cardamom powder and rosewater.
9. Bring the syrup to a boil and then reduce the heat to a simmer.
10. Add the dumplings to the syrup and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
11. Remove the dumplings from the syrup with a slotted spoon and serve warm.
